creator: moiseev@mezonplus.ru
text:
Created attachment 207657
patch

Added rc script to run p0f in daemon mode as as unprivileged user. That is useful to provide access to p0f API via unix socket for various clients (e.g. anti-spam filters like rspamd, haraka-plugin-p0f, etc.).

- Add rc script
- Add UID/GID
- Use USES=tar:tgz
